title: Child and Adolescent Development
description: An overview of the physical, cognitive, and socio-emotional development of children and adolescents.
content:
Topic 1: Physical Development

Content for physical development during childhood and adolescence, including puberty, brain development, and motor skills.

Key Concepts

  • Cephalocaudal and Proximodistal patterns
  • Growth spurts
  • Impact of nutrition and sleep

title: Rizal's Life and Works
description: A comprehensive review of the life, works, and writings of the national hero, Dr. Jose Rizal.
content:
Chapter 1: The World in Rizal's Time

Understanding the context of the 19th century is crucial to appreciating Rizal's life and impact. This includes the political situations in Spain and the Philippines.

Major Works

  • Noli Me Tángere
  • El Filibusterismo
  • To the Young Women of Malolos
